name: Private Key Theft - SSH and TLS Key File Access
description: Detects private key theft by monitoring for SSH key file access, certutil certificate export, OpenSSL key operations, and DPAPI certificate extraction via SharpDPAPI.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.args : ("*id_rsa*", "*id_ed25519*", "*id_ecdsa*", "*.ssh/id_*") or (process.name == "certutil.exe" and process.args : ("-exportPFX", "-backup")) or process.args : ("*SharpDPAPI*", "*.pfx*", "*.p12*"))
